name: EXTREME NETWORKS INC
business: Extreme Networks is a leader in AI-powered cloud networking, selling networking equipment, software subscriptions, and related maintenance contracts to tens of thousands of customers globally across various verticals including sports and entertainment venues, hospitality, retail, transportation and logistics, education, government, healthcare, manufacturing and service providers.

exposures.sentence: Extreme also designs, develops, and manufactures wired, wireless, and software-defined wide area network (SD-WAN) infrastructure equipment.

AI-powered automation includes conversational, interactive and autonomous AI agents to assist, advise and accelerate the productivity of networking, security and business teams reducing the time to complete complex tasks.
ExtremeCloud Universal ZTNA, is the first network security offering to integrate network, application, and device security within a single solution.

Extreme s data center switches and routers provide high levels of reliability and throughput - specifically designed to address the exacting demands of high-performance enterprise and cloud data centers.

catalysts.event: Extreme Platform ONE made generally available
catalysts.sentence: Our Extreme Platform ONE solution, announced in December 2024 and made generally available in July 2025, is a technology platform that reduces the complexity for enterprises by seamlessly integrating networking, security and AI solutions into a single platform.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for networking solutions exceeded $42 billion in calendar year 2024, projected to reach $59 billion by 2029 at a 7% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the total addressable market (TAM) for our networking solutions, consisting of cloud networking, wireless local area networks (WLAN), campus local area networks (LAN), Ethernet switching, data center networking, SD-WAN solutions, and elements of the Secure Access Service Edge (SASE), exceeded $42 billion in calendar year 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Cloud-managed networking solutions expected to grow at 15% CAGR through 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: Within this market, cloud-managed networking solutions are expected to grow at a CAGR of approximately 15% through 2029.

tamClaims.claim: AI Networking for the Campus forecasted to grow at 72% CAGR over next five years.
tamClaims.sentence: And with Extreme Platform ONE, we are addressing AI Networking for the Campus, a high-growth segment forecasted to grow at a 72% CAGR over the next five years.

tamClaims.claim: Cloud networking estimated as a $15 billion segment growing at 15% annually.
tamClaims.sentence: Cloud networking is estimated to be a $15 billion segment of the networking market comprising cloud-managed services and cloud-managed products, which are largely WLAN access points and ethernet switches, growing at 15% annually over the next five years, according to data from the 650 Group, Gartner, IDC and Dell'Oro.

tamClaims.claim: Mid-market TAM $10 billion, Enterprise TAM $22 billion, Service provider TAM $2 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Mid-market customers typically with 500 to 999 employees, are regional or national in scope and possess moderate IT complexity and budgets. This segment represents an estimated TAM of $10 billion in 2025. Enterprise customers defined as companies with 1,000 or more employees operate global-scale infrastructures and require advanced security and compliance capabilities, representing a TAM of approximately $22 billion in 2025. Service providers which include organizations delivering voice, data, or internet services to consumers and businesses, vary widely in sizes. This segment accounts for a TAM of approximately $2 billion in 2025.
